chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D–3442 of 2025 ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.14562/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 5 3. For order on Misc. No.14563/2025 4. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Saleem Khan, Advocate for Petitioner a/w Petitioner --------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this Petition, the Petitioner through Attorney seeks protective-cum-transitory bail enabling him to come Pakistan from Bahrain as an FIR No.134 of 2024 is registered at police station Arambagh Karachi South under Section 489-F, PPC against him. The case of the Petitioner is that he is willing to appear before the trial Court and to contest the case; however, he is under apprehension that upon arrival at the airport in Pakistan, he would be arrested. The Petitioner has also placed on record the relevant documents along with reservation confirmation ticket, which is available at page No.33 with the memo of Petition. Since the Petitioner wants to surrender before the trial Court, therefore, he is granted protective bail for a period of ten days from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, to enable the Petitioner to appear before the trial Court or any other forum for appropriate relief. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE FAIZAN/
